meaning: United Nations Relief and Works Agency 联合国难民救济及工程局
examples: His clear goal was to shift the blame away from UNRWA for the unpopular policies.
Those need assistance from (the United Nations agency for Palestinian refugees) UNRWA or other international humanitarian organisations.
"For us it is vital to get computers to our kids, " Adnan Abu Hasna of UNRWA told BBC News.
